meta.title: kidi.ai — Learning that feels like play
meta.description: AI-powered personalized education for kids aged 4–12. Adaptive lessons, real progress, endless curiosity.
meta.keywords: AI education, kids learning, personalized learning, adaptive learning, kidi

hero.title: Learning that feels like
hero.subtitle: kidi.ai adapts to your child's unique pace and curiosity — creating a school that never feels like school.

features.title: Built for the way kids actually learn
features.subtitle: Not flashcards. Not boring videos. A living, breathing curriculum that grows with your child.

items.title: Adaptive AI Engine
items.desc: Every lesson adjusts in real-time based on what your child gets right, wrong, or skips entirely.

items.title: Game-based Learning
items.desc: Progress feels like leveling up. Kids earn rewards, unlock stories, and keep coming back on their own.

items.title: Parent Dashboard
items.desc: See exactly what your child learned today, where they're thriving, and where they need a little extra help.

items.title: Multilingual Support
items.desc: Learn in English, Turkish, and more. Great for bilingual families and international schools.

items.title: Safe & Ad-free
items.desc: No ads, no dark patterns, no social feeds. Just pure, joyful learning in a protected environment.

items.title: Instant Setup
items.desc: Ready in under 2 minutes. No app downloads required — works on any tablet, phone, or computer.

parentApp.title: Stay Connected with Your Child's Journey
parentApp.subtitle: The parent app gives you full visibility into your child's learning — progress, achievements, and insights — all in the palm of your hand.

howItWorks.title: From zero to learning in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to unlock your child's potential.

steps.title: Create your child's profile
steps.desc: Tell us your child's age, interests, and current level. Our AI builds a personalized curriculum on the spot.

steps.title: Start the first lesson
steps.desc: Your child dives into an interactive adventure. The AI watches, adapts, and keeps things perfectly challenging.

steps.title: Watch them grow
steps.desc: Get weekly progress reports. See skills develop. Celebrate milestones together as a family.

items.quote: My son actually asks to do his lessons now. That has never happened before in his life.
items.author: Sarah M.

items.quote: We use kidi.ai for both English and Turkish. The language switching is seamless and our daughter loves it.
items.author: Mehmet K.

items.quote: The parent dashboard is incredible. I finally understand where my child is actually struggling and thriving.
items.author: Priya R.

items.q: What ages is kidi.ai designed for?
items.a: kidi.ai is built for children aged 4 to 12. The AI adapts the difficulty, visual complexity, and interaction style based on your child's age and assessed level.

items.q: Do I need to download an app?
items.a: No download required. kidi.ai works in any modern web browser — on tablets, phones, Chromebooks, and desktops. Your child's progress syncs automatically across all devices.
Absolutely. We are COPPA and GDPR compliant. We never sell data, never show ads, and store only what's needed for personalized learning.

items.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.a: Yes, cancel anytime with one click. No questions, no retention flows, no hassle. Your data stays accessible for 30 days after cancellation.

items.q: How does the AI adapt to my child?
items.a: Our engine tracks 40+ signals per session — response time, error patterns, re-attempt behavior, and engagement — to keep lessons in the optimal challenge zone, always.
Yes. The Starter plan is free forever. The Family plan includes a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

footer.tagline: Making every child a curious, confident learner.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body:
Please read these Terms carefully before purchasing or using kidi. By placing an order or activating a kidi device, you agree to be bound by these Terms on behalf of yourself and your child.

1. Who We Are

kidi.ai is a product of APPFAB UYGULAMA FABRİKASI YAZILIM ANONİM ŞİRKETİ ("APPFAB", "we", "us", "our"), a company incorporated in Turkey.

APPFAB UYGULAMA FABRİKASI YAZILIM ANONİM ŞİRKETİ Mustafa Kemal Mah. Dumlupınar Blv. B Blok No: 266 B İç Kapı No: 73
Çankaya / Ankara, Turkey
hello@kidi.ai

2. What kidi Is

kidi is a voice-first smart speaker hardware device designed for children aged 4–6. It teaches English as a foreign language through short, structured daily dialogues. The device includes a small ambient display used only for visual cues such as facial expressions and simple icons. Learning occurs primarily through listening and speaking — not screen interaction.

kidi is accompanied by a parent-facing mobile application ("Parent App") that provides progress reports, usage controls, and account management.

3. Eligibility & Parental Consent

kidi is designed exclusively for children aged 4 to 6 years old. The device must be purchased and activated by a parent or legal guardian who is at least 18 years of age.

By creating an account, you confirm that:

  • You are the parent or legal guardian of the child who will use kidi.
  • You have the legal authority to accept these Terms on behalf of your child.
  • You will supervise your child's use of kidi in accordance with these Terms.

We do not knowingly collect personal data directly from children. All account management is handled through the Parent App by the adult account holder.

4. Device Purchase & Hardware

4.1 One-time Purchase

The kidi hardware device is sold as a one-time purchase. Title to the hardware passes to you upon delivery. APPFAB retains all intellectual property rights in the firmware, software, and content on the device.

4.2 Warranty

The kidi device comes with a 2-year limited hardware warranty covering manufacturing defects under normal use conditions. The warranty does not cover physical damage, liquid damage, or unauthorized modifications.

4.3 Returns

You may return an unopened kidi device within 14 days of delivery for a full refund. Opened devices may be returned within 14 days if the device is defective. To initiate a return, contact hello@kidi.ai.

5. Subscription & Billing

5.1 Subscription Requirement

A paid subscription is required to access the kidi curriculum, AI conversation engine, and Parent App features beyond the included trial period. The first month is included free with hardware purchase.

5.2 Billing

Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually depending on the plan selected at checkout. All prices are inclusive of applicable taxes where required by law.

5.3 Cancellation

You may cancel your subscription at any time through the Parent App. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. We do not offer partial refunds for unused subscription time, except where required by applicable law.

5.4 Price Changes

We will notify you at least 30 days before any subscription price increase. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the new price.

6. Acceptable Use

You agree to use kidi only for its intended purpose of supporting your child's English language learning. You must not:

  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, modify, or tamper with the device hardware or firmware.
  • Use kidi for commercial purposes or resell access to the platform.
  • Attempt to circumvent the content safety systems on the device.
  • Allow children outside the registered age range to use the device in ways it was not designed for.
  • Use the device in a manner that violates applicable laws or regulations.

7. Intellectual Property

All content on the kidi device — including the curriculum, lesson dialogues, character designs, voice assets, and software — is the exclusive intellectual property of APPFAB or its licensors. You receive a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to use this content solely for your child's personal, non-commercial learning.

8. Privacy & Child Data

We are committed to protecting children's privacy. Please read our Privacy Policy and our KVKK Notice carefully — they form part of these Terms. Key points:

  • Voice audio is processed in real-time and is not retained long-term.
  • We do not display advertisements to children.
  • We do not sell any personal data.
  • Parents can request data deletion at any time via hello@kidi.ai.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, APPFAB's liability to you for any claim arising out of these Terms shall not exceed the amount you paid for the device and/or subscription in the 12 months preceding the claim.

APPFAB is not liable for: indirect or consequential loss; loss of data; loss of educational progress or outcomes; or interruption of service due to reasons beyond our reasonable control.

10. Service Availability

We aim to provide uninterrupted service but cannot guarantee 100% uptime. We may perform scheduled maintenance (with advance notice where possible) and reserve the right to modify or discontinue features with reasonable notice. In the event of permanent discontinuation of the service, we will offer a pro-rated refund of any prepaid subscription fees.

11. Governing Law & Disputes

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey. Any dispute arising from these Terms shall first be submitted to good-faith negotiation. If unresolved, disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Ankara, Turkey.

Consumers in the European Union retain the right to bring claims before the courts of their country of residence under applicable EU consumer protection law.

12. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by email or via the Parent App at least 14 days before they take effect. Your continued use of kidi after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

13. Contact

For any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

APPFAB UYGULAMA FABRİKASI YAZILIM ANONİM ŞİRKETİ Mustafa Kemal Mah. Dumlupınar Blv. B Blok No: 266 B İç Kapı No: 73
Çankaya / Ankara, Turkey
hello@kidi.ai

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
kidi is designed for young children. We take their privacy extremely seriously. We collect the minimum data necessary to provide the service, we never show ads, and we never sell data. This policy explains exactly what we collect, why, and what your rights are.

1. Data Controller

The data controller for all personal data processed in connection with kidi is:

APPFAB UYGULAMA FABRİKASI YAZILIM ANONİM ŞİRKETİ Mustafa Kemal Mah. Dumlupınar Blv. B Blok No: 266 B İç Kapı No: 73
Çankaya / Ankara, Turkey
hello@kidi.ai

2. Children's Privacy — Our Core Commitment

kidi is used by children aged 4–6. We design our data practices around this fact:

  • No direct data collection from children. Children do not create accounts. All account management is handled by the parent in the Parent App.
  • No advertising. We never display ads to children or use child interaction data to build advertising profiles.
  • No data selling. We do not sell any personal data — whether belonging to parents or children.
  • Minimal data principle. We collect only what is strictly necessary to provide the learning service.
  • Voice data is not retained. Voice audio captured during sessions is processed in real-time by our AI and is not stored in identifiable form beyond the active session.

We comply with the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK), the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), and the US Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) where applicable.

3. What Data We Collect

3.1 Parent / Account Holder Data

DataPurposeLegal Basis
NameAccount identificationContract performance
Email addressAccount login, notifications, supportContract performance
Password (hashed)Account securityContract performance
Billing informationPayment processing (not stored by us)Contract performance
Device delivery addressShipping hardwareContract performance
App usage logsService improvement, bug fixingLegitimate interest

3.2 Child Profile Data (entered by parent)

DataPurposeLegal Basis
Child's first namePersonalised greetings by kidiContract performance
Child's age (year)Curriculum calibrationContract performance
Learning levelLesson difficulty adjustmentContract performance

3.3 Learning Session Data

DataPurposeLegal Basis
Session durationProgress reports, usage limitsContract performance
Lessons completedCurriculum progress trackingContract performance
Words/patterns attemptedAdaptive curriculum adjustmentContract performance
Response patterns (not audio)AI personalisationContract performance

3.4 Voice Audio

Voice audio captured from the child during a session is transmitted securely to our AI processing service for real-time speech recognition and response generation. Audio is not stored in identifiable form after processing. Anonymised acoustic patterns may be retained for model improvement purposes only, with no link to any individual child.

4. How We Use Data

  • To provide and improve the kidi learning service
  • To personalise the curriculum to the child's level and progress
  • To generate progress reports for parents
  • To enforce usage limits set by parents
  • To send transactional emails (order confirmation, subscription updates)
  • To provide customer support
  • To comply with legal obligations

We do not use data for: advertising, profiling, sale to third parties, or any purpose unrelated to the educational service.

5. Data Sharing

We do not sell or rent personal data. We share data only with the following categories of service providers, under binding data processing agreements:

  • Cloud infrastructure provider — for hosting the service and data storage
  • AI/speech processing provider — for real-time voice interaction (audio is not retained)
  • Payment processor — for billing (we do not store payment card details)
  • Email service provider — for transactional emails

All service providers are contractually prohibited from using kidi data for any purpose other than providing the specific service to us.

We may also disclose data where required by Turkish law, court order, or regulatory authority.

6. Data Retention

  • Account data: Retained while your account is active and for 30 days after deletion request, then permanently deleted.
  • Child profile & learning data: Retained while the account is active. Deleted within 30 days of account deletion request.
  • Voice audio: Not retained beyond the active session.
  • Billing records: Retained for 10 years as required by Turkish tax law.

7. Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data, including:

  • TLS encryption for all data in transit
  • Encryption at rest for stored personal data
  • Strict access controls — only authorised personnel can access personal data
  • Regular security assessments

In the event of a data breach affecting your rights, we will notify you within 72 hours of becoming aware of it, as required by applicable law.

8. International Data Transfers

Our primary infrastructure is located in Turkey and the European Economic Area (EEA). If any data is transferred outside Turkey or the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place in accordance with KVKK and GDPR requirements.

9. Your Rights

As a parent and account holder, you have the following rights regarding your personal data and your child's profile data:

  • Right to access — request a copy of the data we hold about you
  • Right to rectification — request correction of inaccurate data
  • Right to erasure — request deletion of your and your child's data
  • Right to restriction — request limited processing in certain circumstances
  • Right to data portability — receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
  • Right to object — object to processing based on legitimate interest

To exercise any of these rights, email us at hello@kidi.ai. We will respond within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Turkish Personal Data Protection Authority (KVKK Kurumu) or your local data protection authority.

10. Cookies

The kidi device itself does not use cookies. The Parent App (web version) uses the following cookies:

  • Essential cookies: Required for login session management. These cannot be disabled.
  • Analytics cookies: Used to understand how parents use the app, in anonymised form. You may opt out via app settings.

We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.

11. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by email or via the Parent App at least 14 days before they take effect.

12. Contact

For any privacy questions or to exercise your rights:

APPFAB UYGULAMA FABRİKASI YAZILIM ANONİM ŞİRKETİ Mustafa Kemal Mah. Dumlupınar Blv. B Blok No: 266 B İç Kapı No: 73
Çankaya / Ankara, Turkey
hello@kidi.ai
